noTradePolicy: No trade today is a valid report when none of the current Kalshi prices clear the evidence bar.

opportunities.title: Above 6%
opportunities.reason: Polling-first view: Democrats leads Republicans 52.95-47.05 in the current average, latest tracked spread is Democrats +5.9, and Democrats lead the generic ballot by 5.9pts (53% D / 47% R). Polling has been stable with Dems holding a modest lead. That supports roughly 74c fair value.
